title: Design System: Barangay Sto. Niño Court Scheduler

display.purpose: Page titles, hero numbers, login headline. Instrument Serif at 400 weight only.

headline.purpose: Card heads, dialog heads, section titles inside the reservation form, calendar week label.

title.purpose: Inter 600 to 700 from 16 to 22px. Booking row name, nav label, brand title, table emphasis.

body.purpose: Inter 17px at 1.5 line-height. The 17px baseline is a deliberate staff-readability floor.

label.purpose: Inter 600 12 to 14px with 0.06em letter-spacing on uppercase. Table headers, eyebrows, status text.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle contained surfaces when a border alone is not enough.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Calendar toolbar, staff day cards (resting), hover lift on form cards.

shadows.name: shadow-detail
shadows.purpose: Sticky reservation detail rail beside lists.

motion.name: ease-default
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. Used implicitly with 120 to 160ms durations.

motion.name: duration-quick
motion.purpose: Hover and selection on rows, blocks, chips, and nav items.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Button background and border state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Civic blue action. The default primary for save, approve, navigate.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary { background: #0B4A6F; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #083A57; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(11, 74, 111, 0.32); outline-offset: 3px; border-color: #B9B19E; }

components.name: Large Primary Button
components.description: The main action of a screen. Add Reservation, Save, Approve.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary { background: #0B4A6F; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #083A57; } .ds-btn-big { min-height: 64px; padding: 0 28px; font-size: 18px; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(11, 74, 111, 0.32); outline-offset: 3px; border-color: #B9B19E; }

components.name: Light Button
components.description: Neutral secondary action. Cancel, Go back, Filter.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; border: 2px solid #DCD6C7; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-light { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2937; } .ds-btn-light:hover { background: #F0ECE3; border-color: #B9B19E; } .ds-btn-light:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(11, 74, 111, 0.32); outline-offset: 3px; border-color: #B9B19E; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action: Cancel reservation, Delete account. Visible without competing with primary.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; border: 2px solid #B83B2A; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-danger { background: #FFFFFF; color: #B83B2A; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #FADEDA; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(184, 59, 42, 0.32); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content surface. Paper white on warm cream, 10px corners, 20px padding, 1px Office Border.
components.html:
Today's schedule

Three reservations pending approval. Two are walk-ins from this morning.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2937; border: 1px solid #DCD6C7; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-padded { display: grid; gap: 18px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Instrument Serif', Georgia, serif; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.1; color: #1F2937; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.5; color: #6B7280; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Staff-friendly form field with English label, Filipino italic helper, hint, and error slot.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { display: block; color: #1F2937; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-field-fil { margin-left: 4px; color: #6B7280; font-size: 14px; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field-hint { display: block; color: #6B7280; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 54px; border: 2px solid #DCD6C7; border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2937; font-family: inherit; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0B4A6F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #DCEAF2; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill with a colored dot prefix and a labeled state word. Never carries color alone.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; min-height: 30px; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid #DCD6C7; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2937; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status::before { content: ''; width: 8px; height: 8px; flex: 0 0 auto; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; } .ds-status-reserved { border-color: #B9D4E3; background: #DCEAF2; color: #083A57; } .ds-status-available { border-color: #B9D7C8; background: #E8F4EE; color: #1F7A43; } .ds-status-missed { border-color: #E7B4AD; background: #FAE8E5; color: #B83B2A; } .ds-status-completed { border-color: #DCEAF2; background: #EFF5F8; color: #0B4A6F; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Persistent left sidebar row with icon well, English label, Filipino-tone helper text, and visible active state.
components.css: .ds-nav { width: 100%; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 44px minmax(0, 1fr) auto; align-items: center; gap: 14px; min-height: 68px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; color: #1F2937; text-align: left; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease; } .ds-nav:hover { background: #F0ECE3; } .ds-nav-active { border-color: #DCEAF2; background: #EFF5F8; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #F0ECE3; color: #1F2937; } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-icon { background: #0B4A6F; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-nav-copy { display: grid; min-width: 0; } .ds-nav-label { color: #1F2937; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-label { color: #0B4A6F; } .ds-nav-helper { display: block; margin-top: 3px; color: #6B7280; font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Time Chip
components.description: Reservation start-time picker. Default, hover, selected, and busy variants. Selected and busy carry a sub-caption.
components.css: .ds-time-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 10px; } .ds-time-chip { position: relative; min-height: 60px; border: 2px solid #DCD6C7; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2937; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease, color 120ms ease; } .ds-time-chip:not(:disabled):hover, .ds-time-chip:not(:disabled):focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #0B4A6F; background: #EFF5F8; } .ds-time-chip-selected { border-color: #0B4A6F; background: #0B4A6F; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-time-chip-selected::after { content: 'Selected'; display: block; margin-top: 2px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; opacity: 0.9; } .ds-time-chip-busy { background: #F0ECE3; color: #6B7280; border-style: dashed; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-time-chip-busy::after { content: 'Booked'; display: block; margin-top: 2px; color: #B83B2A; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: This system reads like a well-organized barangay office ledger translated to a screen: warm paper surfaces, civic blue for official action, a court-orange accent for local identity, large readable controls, and labels that speak to staff instead of software specialists. It is a product surface, not a campaign. The design serves the scheduling workflow and stays calm even when conflicts, missed bookings, and approvals demand attention all at once. The persistent left sidebar, 17px body text, 48px minimum control height, and bilingual helper text (Filipino italic underneath English) carry the staff-friendly direction. Instrument Serif appears only at orientation moments (page titles, hero stats, section heads), giving each screen a small civic formality before Inter takes over for the working surfaces. Status colors are always paired with words. The system explicitly rejects the previous prototype's claustrophobic cream-and-red spreadsheet feel, public startup landing-page polish, sports-entertainment energy, dark command-center dashboards, tiny admin-table density, and any cloud-booking language that implies residents reserve remotely.
keyCharacteristics: Warm office-paper background (#F6F4EE) with white card surfaces and civic blue (#0B4A6F) for primary action.
17px body baseline, 48px minimum standard controls, 64px for the main screen action.
Persistent left sidebar with large labeled targets, 44px icon wells, and visible active state.
Status pills paired with words, never relying on color alone.
Borders and tonal surfaces do most structural work; shadows reserved for overlays and hover lift.
Short, functional motion only: 120 to 160ms transitions on hover, focus, dialogs, and skeleton shimmer.

rules.name: The Blue Means Action Rule
rules.body: Civic Blue is reserved for primary intent, active navigation, and confirmed selected states. Do not spend it on decoration, illustration, or default body copy.

rules.name: The Status Must Read Rule
rules.body: Never rely on color alone. Every status pill, calendar block, and table row state must carry text or an icon alongside its color. The status-badge primitive bakes this in: a colored dot precedes a labeled word.

rules.name: The Court Orange Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Court Orange (#C85C1C) appears in three places only: the page eyebrow line, the user-chip avatar, and the login serif em accent. It does not serve as a button background, an alert color, or a decorative surface tint.

rules.name: The Staff Can Read It Rule
rules.body: Working text never drops below 14px. Forms, cards, and navigation stay at 16px or larger. The body baseline is 17px and that is the floor, not the ceiling.

rules.name: The Title Has a Job Rule
rules.body: Use Instrument Serif only for orientation and emphasis (page titles, hero numbers, card heads, section heads inside the reservation form, calendar day numbers). Never inside dense tables, repeated metadata, button labels, badges, or table cells.

rules.name: The Bilingual Italic Rule
rules.body: Filipino helper text appears as italic muted Inter at 13 to 14px directly under the English label, prefixed with a middle dot. It is never the primary label and never replaces the English label.

rules.name: The Border First Rule
rules.body: Use 1px Office Border and tonal layers for normal structure. Use shadows only when the surface floats above the page (drawer, dialog, sticky detail), moves (hover lift on form cards), or signals a major rest state (calendar toolbar, day card).

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur and translucent glass surfaces are not part of this system. Backdrops behind dialogs use opaque dark fill, never backdrop-filter.

dos: Do keep the product offline-first and staff-mediated in language and workflow. Use phrases like Encode walk-in, Office computer, Today's schedule, not Book online, User account, or Cloud sync.
Do use 48px minimum control height for staff-touched controls and 64px for the main screen action.
Do pair English labels with Filipino helper italics whenever it lowers staff hesitation. The English label is the primary; the Filipino is a service.
Do keep reservation status visible in lists, calendars, dialogs, and reports. The status-badge primitive must accompany every reservation reference.
Do use Civic Blue for action and identity, Court Orange sparingly for local accent, and Paper Surface tones for everything that holds content.
Do lift overlay surfaces with shadow-lg and bordered surfaces with 1px Office Border at rest.
donts: Don't make it look like a public startup landing page or a marketing campaign.
Don't make it look like a sports entertainment app: no team-color saturation, no neon, no display gradients.
Don't ship a dark command-center dashboard as the default staff experience.
Don't use tiny admin-table typography for primary workflows. Working text stays at 14px or larger; data-table cells stay at 15px or larger.
Don't use jargon-heavy workflow labels (Provision, Initialize, Onboard) where plain civic verbs work (Add, Save, Approve, Cancel).
Don't use decorative glassmorphism, neon gradients, gradient text, or hidden controls that require training to discover.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe except on the calendar staff-booking-block. No other surface in the system carries one.
Don't imply residents can reserve remotely. The system is staff-mediated and offline.
Don't use Court Orange as a button background, alert color, or surface tint.
Don't rely on color alone for status. If a booking is missed, Missed must read as a word, not just a red color.
